docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT SAFETY NATIONAL CASUALTY CORPORATION MACK'S BAIL BONDS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
